finding: PHP detection regex ambiguous on 3+ boundary cases: non-standard shebangs (php8.2), UTF-8 BOM before <?php, whitespace before <?php contradicts 'starts with <?php directly' prose.
suggestion: Specify exact shebang strings triggering BinProxyWrapper. Specify BOM handling. Reconcile prose with regex re: leading whitespace.

finding: BinProxyWrapper template undefined — 'matching Composer's implementation' is ambiguous (byte-identical? functionally equivalent? API-compatible?). No deterministic test possible.
suggestion: Embed exact class body in spec or reference exact Composer source commit/version.

finding: Non-PHP shell proxy has no template — only prose description. Two engineers would produce entirely different shell scripts. No expected output for pass/fail test.
suggestion: Provide exact shell proxy template with shebang, path resolution, env-var assignment, exec invocation.

finding: installed.php root entry: unclear which composer.json fields map to pretty_version/version, fallback values undefined, normalization rules missing. Two engineers would make incompatible choices.
suggestion: Specify exact fallback for each field when absent from composer.json. Specify normalization rules for version field.

finding: Progress output format underspecified: bar character, timing precision, unit thresholds (MB→GB), tilde prefix rules all undefined. Integration tests checking stdout will be non-deterministic.
suggestion: Specify exact format strings with placeholder patterns for dynamic values. Enable regex-based test matching.

finding: Status conditions don't cover: malformed state JSON, missing lock_hash field, unreadable composer.lock. Two engineers would choose different outputs.
suggestion: Add explicit rows for malformed/incomplete state file and unreadable composer.lock.

finding: autoload field mapping: when package.autoload is absent in composer.lock, should installed.json omit the key, use null, or {}? dumpautoload behavior differs per choice.
suggestion: State explicitly: if autoload absent, set to {} in installed.json.

finding: install-path for platform pseudo-packages (php, ext-json) undefined. Unclear whether they appear in installed.json at all.
suggestion: State whether platform pseudo-packages are included and what install-path value they receive.

finding: Exit code 1 covers 3+ distinct failure modes (unsupported dist.type, extraction failure, concurrent timeout). Programmatic error handling impossible by exit code alone.
suggestion: Assign distinct exit codes or document that exit 1 is catch-all and tests must parse stderr.

finding: '3 consecutive packages fail within 10 seconds' undefined in parallel context — consecutive by what ordering? Window start point undefined.
suggestion: Specify: 'any 3 failures whose completion timestamps fall within any 10-second sliding window'.

finding: 'Single top-level directory' stripping undefined when archive has both root files and a directory. Two engineers would implement different conditions.
suggestion: Specify: strip only when every file path shares the same single directory prefix and no files exist at root level.

finding: dumpautoload runs after atomic swap. If it fails partway, vendor is partially modified with old vendor already deleted. Recovery undefined.
suggestion: Specify recovery behavior on dumpautoload failure.

finding: Proxy permissions chmod(0777 & ~umask()) — 'typically 0755'. Non-deterministic test — depends on runtime umask.
suggestion: Specify fixed permission (0755) or require test environment sets umask 022.

finding: Status date format unspecified — ISO 8601? local timezone? UTC? Two engineers produce different formats.
suggestion: Specify exact date format (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD in UTC).

finding: composer.json required unconditionally but --no-autoload makes it unnecessary. Interaction unspecified.
suggestion: Clarify: composer.json required only when dumpautoload will run.

finding: --workers clamping: warning message text, output stream (stdout/stderr), and exit code behavior unspecified.
suggestion: Specify warning message, stderr stream, and exit code 0 after clamping.

finding: Field mapping table omits several fields dumpautoload may read: require, conflict, provide, replace, suggest, keywords, license, source, dist.
suggestion: Audit which installed.json fields composer dumpautoload reads. Document pass-through policy.

finding: Performance targets depend on network/disk/Composer version — non-deterministic in CI. Cannot write pass/fail tests.
suggestion: Specify reference environment or mark as benchmarks, not gating tests.

finding: HTTP 429 Retry-After wait: unclear whether it counts against the 3-retry budget. Three 429s with 60s waits = 180s wait or 1 retry?
suggestion: State explicitly whether 429 responses consume retry budget.

finding: store_version incompatibility: exit code, error message, and output stream undefined. Not in Section 7.3 exit code table.
suggestion: Assign exit code and define error message for store version mismatch.

finding: lock_hash computation undefined — raw bytes vs canonical JSON? Different whitespace normalization = different hashes.
suggestion: Specify: SHA-256 of raw file bytes of composer.lock as read from disk (no normalization).

finding: gzip dist.type 'always treated as tar.gz' — bare gzip-compressed non-tar file handling undefined.
suggestion: Specify: if decompressed stream is not valid tar, treat as archive extraction failure per Section 11.1.

finding: Exit code 5 covers both 'composer not found' and 'dumpautoload failed' — distinct causes sharing one code.
suggestion: Consider splitting exit code 5 or document that stderr parsing is required to distinguish.
